titles.title: Financial Services and General Government Appropriations Act, 2027
Financial Services and General Government Appropriations Act, 2027
Financial Services and General Government Appropriations Act, 2027
Making appropriations for financial services and general government for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2027, and for other purposes.

action.text: The House Committee on Appropriations reported an original measure, H. Rept. 119-623, by Mr. Joyce (OH).

calendar.text: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 540.
